name: Juané Schoeman
title: Software Developer
greeting: ✦ Welcome to my corner of the universe
bio: A South African software developer with a love for building things that are both beautiful and functional. Passionate about clean code, great user experiences, and learning something new every day.

projects.title: Virtual CV
projects.description: An interactive online CV built from scratch and hosted on GitHub Pages. Features a Pac-Man themed animation, dynamic content loading from JSON, and a retro arcade aesthetic.

projects.title: Arcademia
projects.description: An arcade-style educational game built collaboratively with a team of 13 developers. Owned the design and logic behind the game blocks — including their behaviour, interactions, and visual implementation.
